name: Route Verification Proof 20260612
tagline: A proof page that catches route, branch, and public URL drift before customers see it.
thesis: Route Verification Proof 20260612 exists to verify the OpenAITPM publishing loop end to end: a checked-in idea file must produce a stable route, a matching source branch, a valid repo path, and a public URL. The first user is the operator maintaining the launch system.
audience: OpenAITPM operators who need confidence that every idea branch maps cleanly to a public route.
proofPoints: The route verifier checks slug, route, sourceBranch, repoPath, and required page copy.
Long slugs preserve uniqueness suffixes instead of truncating into collisions.
GitHub Actions runs the same verification before a branch can be safely merged.

launchChecks.label: Promote route checks into release evidence
